name: loom
description: Parallel coding-agent shells, woven into one window. A Tauri 2 desktop app for orchestrating Claude, Codex, OpenCode, Gemini, Grok, and any other terminal command side-by-side in one workspace.
author: Lukas Baum <lukas@lukasbaum.dev>

scripts.check:fe: biome check apps/desktop/src && bun test apps/desktop/src && bun --filter @loom/desktop build
scripts.check:rs: cargo fmt --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all -- --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets
scripts.check: bun run check:fe && bun run check:rs
